projects.name: moltis

Multi-channel integration (Telegram/Discord/WhatsApp/Signal/Matrix) + MCP + voice I/O

concerns_en: Docker socket mounting exposes privilege escalation risks requiring additional hardening

projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级个人AI助手 | 工程卓越度极高的开源标杆

projects.recommendation_zh: 高度推荐 - 工程实践教科书级范例

多阶段Docker构建、SHA256镜像锁定、pnpm workspace架构完善
企业级CI/CD：自动响应(Barnacle)、Issue管理(ClawSweeper)、CodeQL安全扫描
健壮性设计：checkout重试机制、OOM防护、并发控制、事件防抖
162次发布、366贡献者、可持续维护体系（Dependabot digest刷新）
插件化扩展架构(OPENCLAW_EXTENSIONS)、跨平台支持(Docker/Buildx/Podman)
highlights_en: 372K Stars flagship project representing highest engineering standards
Multi-stage Docker with SHA256-pinned images and pnpm workspace architecture
Enterprise CI/CD: Barnacle auto-response, ClawSweeper issue management, CodeQL scanning
Robustness patterns: checkout retry, OOM mitigation, concurrency controls, event debouncing
162 releases, 366 contributors, sustainable maintenance (Dependabot digest refresh)
Plugin extensibility (OPENCLAW_EXTENSIONS) and cross-platform support (Docker/Buildx/Podman)
concerns_zh: 源码样本中未展示核心业务逻辑，无法评估应用层代码质量
大量自定义GitHub Actions外部依赖（如useblacksmith）存在供应链风险
TypeScript项目无完整类型覆盖率报告可见
concerns_en: Source samples truncated - core business logic not visible for app-layer evaluation
Heavy reliance on custom GitHub Actions (useblacksmith) introduces supply chain risk
No visible TypeScript type coverage reports despite being a TS project

架构良好：支持文件操作、命令执行、Web搜索、定时任务、会话记忆
highlights_en: Clean ~500 lines codebase with well-structured modules
Comprehensive architecture: file ops, command execution, web search, scheduling, memory
concerns_zh: 单贡献者、无测试、无CI/CD，生产级风险高
CLI外部依赖（Claude Code CLI），部署复杂度增加
concerns_en: Single contributor, no tests, no CI/CD — high production risk
External CLI dependency (Claude Code) increases deployment complexity

projects.name: subzeroclaw
projects.summary_zh: 极简边缘AI代理 | 故意放弃安全防护
projects.summary_en: Minimalist edge AI agent | intentionally unsafe by design
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合单设备本地受控环境，不适合有安全合规要求的场景
projects.recommendation_en: For single-device local controlled environments only; not suitable for security-compliant production
highlights_zh: ~380行C代码，54KB二进制，零运行时依赖（除libc）
跨平台C11标准，Pi/嵌入式硬件上可编译运行
highlights_en: ~380 lines C, 54KB binary, zero runtime deps (libc only)
C11 standard, compiles and runs on Pi/embedded hardware
concerns_zh: 明示故意放弃所有安全检查，README明确警告rm -rf等危险命令可执行
concerns_en: Explicitly designed without safety checks; README warns rm -rf can be executed

projects.name: babyclaw
projects.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw built on Claude Agent SDK.
projects.summary_zh: 个人原型级 Telegram Claude 助手 | 功能实用但单点风险高
projects.summary_en: Personal prototype Telegram bot for Claude Code | Feature-rich but single-point-of-failure
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合个人 VPS 自用，不建议生产环境使用
projects.recommendation_en: Suitable for personal VPS self-use only, not for production
highlights_zh: 单文件架构简单易懂
集成官方 Claude Agent SDK
Telegram 远程控制完整实现
highlights_en: Single-file architecture is simple
Official Claude Agent SDK integration
Complete Telegram remote control
concerns_zh: 无测试无 CI/CD，单人维护风险大
手动 .env 解析缺少健壮性
单文件缺乏模块化设计
concerns_en: No tests and CI/CD, single maintainer risk
Manual .env parsing lacks robustness
Single file lacks modularity

projects.name: ZeroClaw-Android
projects.description: Run AI agents 24/7 on your Android phone. Native Rust core, 25+ providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek,         Ollama), encrypted key storage, plugin browser, Material You UI. Self-hosted alternative to Mac Mini setups. MIT           licensed.
projects.summary_zh: 已归档项目 | AI生成代码为主 | 安全风险已知
projects.summary_en: Archived project | Predominantly AI-generated code | Known safety concerns
projects.recommendation_zh: 不推荐用于生产环境 - 项目已归档且存在安全风险
projects.recommendation_en: Not recommended for production - archived with known safety risks
highlights_zh: Material You UI + Jetpack Compose 现代前端架构
Native Rust 核心 + 25+ AI Provider 集成
端到端加密密钥存储设计
highlights_en: Material You UI with Jetpack Compose modern frontend
Native Rust core + 25+ AI provider integrations
End-to-end encrypted key storage design
concerns_zh: 项目已正式归档，停止维护
代码库几乎完全由AI生成，存在安全隐患
单人维护，无后备计划
无CI/CD流水线，测试覆盖缺失
作者明确警告项目"太不安全"
concerns_en: Project officially archived - no longer maintained
Codebase is nearly entirely AI-generated with safety concerns
Single contributor with no succession plan
No CI/CD pipeline - no automated testing
Author explicitly states project is "too unsafe"
